title: ka ,いｋ活用できるか？とkにCursorversa
summary_text: Implementer proposal: expose only 4 repo-native internal wrappers, all read-oriented: `detectCourseKeyword`, `runRiskChecker`, `runPromptPolisher`, and `generateBodyPreview`. Do not toolize the public Edge Functions themselves. Verified against [diagnosis-handlers.ts#L44](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/lib/diagnosis-handlers.ts#L44), [risk-checker.ts#L101](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/lib/risk-checker.ts#L101), [prompt-polisher.ts#L105](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/lib/prompt-polisher.ts#L105), and [message-utils.ts#L76](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-daily-brief/message-utils.ts#L76). Critic challenge: sidecars repeatedly drifted toward invented tools or over-broad reads. The stable constraints were: no direct calls to ingress/scheduler/payment endpoints, bounded string inputs, explicit null handling, and no exposure of health-state or payment-history readers as general agent tools. Integrator decision: ```json [ { "tool": "detect_course_keyword", "gate": "auto", "input": { "text": "string<=4096" }, "output": { "keyword": "DiagnosisKeyword|null" }, "notes": "Reject blank/whitespace-only input instead of silently returning null." }, { "tool": "run_risk_checker", "gate": "auto", "input": { "raw_input": "string<=3000" }, "output": { "success": "boolean", "results": "RiskCheckResult[]|omitted", "summary": "string|omitted", "formatted_message": "string|omitted", "user_error": "string|omitted" }, "notes": "If success=true, return results and formatted_message. Keep raw internal errors internal-only. Keep riskFlags internal/debug-only." }, { "tool": "run_prompt_polisher", "gate": "preview", "input": { "raw_input": "string<=3000" }, "output": { "success": "boolean", "polished_prompt": "string|omitted", "user_error": "string|omitted" }, "notes": "Expose polished_prompt to trusted internal callers; do not expose raw internal error state." }, { "tool": "generate_body_preview", "gate": "preview", "input": { "body": "string<=4500", "max_length": "integer 1..1000, default 50" }, "output": { "preview": "string" }, "notes": "Thin wrapper around the pure formatter only." } ] ``` Applied change: no repo edits; the contract is now narrow enough to implement directly. Verification: local code matched the final shapes, `Claude` and `GLM` both stayed active for the contract rounds, and `Gemini` stayed active as sidecar verifier. `Claude` did time out on one detailed privacy subquestion, but not on the final contract-critical tie-breaks. Lane evidence: - `Codex`: active throughout integration - `Claude`: active for availability, taxonomy, and final exposure tie-break; timed out once on a broader privacy prompt - `GLM`: active throughout schema and validation critique - `Gemini`: active throughout as sidecar verifier The concrete next implementation step is to add these 4 wrappers as internal-only contracts and leave [line-webhook](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts), [stripe-webhook](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts), [relay](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/relay/index.ts), [line-register](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-register/index.ts), and [verification-reminder](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/verification-reminder/index.ts) non-agentic.
